reports.incident_description: Public holiday OT for our ward isn’t appearing in HRMIS; 6 nurses may miss payment. Please open the 1 Jan roster and accept manual OT entries today.
Two new HOs reported but no IDs/biometric access yet; they can’t log into OPD system or drug charting. Kindly expedite onboarding.
Morning showers delayed two nurse candidates; panel marked them absent. Request HR to reschedule per recruitment policy.
Locum anaesthetist’s SLMC card shows expiry 31 Dec. Please verify renewal and stand down the booking if not current.
Induction for new attendants was cancelled due to hall double-booking. Need HR to reschedule today and include safety/harassment briefing before duty.
Night shift allowance for three staff missing from December payroll. Please correct and confirm adjustment.
Biometric unit was moved during repaint; 06:30–07:30 punches not captured. Request HR to regularize attendance for affected staff.
Short rain delayed BLS recert attendees; HR list marked five as absent. Please grant waiver and schedule a makeup session.
Background check for new MLT shows NIC mismatch with submitted transcripts. Hold badge until HR verifies credentials.
Junior nurse reports repeated inappropriate comments by ward clerk. Request HR to initiate formal grievance and assign mediator.
Returned from maternity leave; no breastfeeding break schedule issued. Need HR to formalize timing per policy.
ETF for two HCAs bounced due to EPF number mismatch. Kindly correct HR master data before final payroll run.
Humid afternoon caused fingerprint misreads; many duplicate OUT logs. Please cleanse records and issue guidance on alternate sign-in.
Radiographer candidate delayed by evening rain; panel closed. Request HR to reschedule to avoid disadvantage.
Five consecutive night duties assigned to same two nurses; staff raised fairness grievance. Need HR-led roster review and mediation.
Several MOs haven’t submitted CPD credits; SLMC renewal due next month. Please arrange catch-up CME and update records.
Uniform allowance for six attendants still pending. Kindly release and confirm measurements for new issue.
2025 performance appraisal forms for nursing cadre not circulated; timelines at risk. HR to issue forms and brief appraisers.
Morning drizzle delayed staff buses; 11 OPD staff marked late/absent. Please apply grace as per policy and amend times.
Two attendants complain of verbal abuse by shift supervisor. Request HR inquiry and counseling intervention.
Agency nurse contracts end this week; renewal letters pending. Risk of weekend gaps—please extend or arrange locums.
Probation confirmations for three new MOs pending >6 months; they can’t apply for PGIM rotations. Kindly expedite letters.
New HCA batch without photo IDs—entry disputes at gates and ETU. Please issue ID cards and update access list.
Two community volunteers placed at registration lack police clearance/reference checks. Pause deployment until HR completes vetting.
February duty roster posted with <24 hrs notice; staff can’t arrange swaps. Request HR to enforce 7-day notice and retrain NOICs.
Three new HOs reported today but no ID cards or HR onboarding done; they cannot access drug cupboards or request labs. Please expedite badges and system access.
Locum pharmacist for OPD evening shift hasn’t received contract letter; cannot be placed on duty roster. Need urgent issuance to avoid service gap.
Personnel file shows expired SLMC certificate for visiting anaesthetist scheduled for theatre today. Please verify renewal immediately or provide approved substitute.
Biometric scanner kept rejecting staff after the warm, humid evening; several ETU nurses marked absent. Request manual attendance acceptance and sync fix.
Two new OPD cashiers joined without formal induction on patient privacy and cash handling. Kindly arrange HR orientation this week.
Contract kitchen assistants worked beyond legal hours during lunch rush; no overtime forms processed. Need HR guidance and payroll correction as per labor law.
Multiple new attendants handling oxygen cylinders without recent safety training. Please coordinate a mandatory refresher session.
Light rain soaked gate staff; dispute arose about taking unscheduled drying breaks. Request HR mediation and a clear bad-weather break policy.
Ward 12 night shift nursing allowance missing for January due to HRIS roster not updated. Kindly validate and process arrears.
HRMS lists me as ‘Intern’ though my appointment is HO; on-call meal allowance rejected. Please correct grade and update entitlements.
Very hot midday conditions; OPD staff complaining of headaches. Request HR to implement short scheduled hydration breaks without pay loss.
BLS certificates for four newly posted nurses expire end of month; renewal session not booked. Please arrange training at the skills lab urgently.
Background checks for two temporary registration clerks still pending; they handle patient identity data. Request urgent police clearance verification.
Thundery evening rain delayed staff buses; several attendants auto-marked absent. Please apply weather-related grace and adjust attendance.
New registrar from PGIM started but no hospital ID yet; access blocked to SCBU. Kindly expedite ID and SLMC verification copy.
Weekend locum scrub nurse contract renewal not issued; elective list at risk of cancellation. Request immediate processing.
Morning drizzle left workers’ fingers wet; biometric clock-in failed for several casuals. Need HR to accept manual attendance for payroll.
Two physio assistants disputing weekend duty swaps; no signed HR-approved swap protocol. Request mediation and formal process.
Sharps safety refresher overdue for new interns and attendants; last session was 18 months ago. Please organize mandatory training.
EPF/ETF numbers still not appearing on my payslip and bank details not updated since joining. Kindly rectify before next payroll.
Maternity leave for Staff Nurse Jayasuriya approved, but reliever not recruited; March roster cannot be finalized. Please arrange a reliever.
Foreign-trained radiographer awaiting credential verification; cannot assign independent shifts until SLMC registration and equivalency confirmed.
Two MLS trainees started without HR onboarding checklist or safety briefing. Request immediate orientation scheduling.
Brief evening rain left staff uniforms wet; dispute with nursing sister over issuing spare scrubs. Please clarify uniform policy and mediate.
Twelve minor staff contracts expire at month-end; renewal notes not yet issued. Need HR to process extensions to avoid service breaks.
Two newly recruited attendants reported for duty without appointment letters or EPF/ETF numbers; payroll and rostering on hold. Request HR to issue letters and enroll them today.
Shortlisted staff nurse missed 10:00 interview due to sudden downpour and flooded bus route. Please treat as weather-affected and reschedule, not a no-show.
Credential audit flagged an on-duty radiographer with license expired on 28 Feb; rostered tonight. Need HR to verify renewal and stand down if not cleared.
Induction session in non-AC hall halted as two trainees became dizzy in the afternoon heat. Please move tomorrow’s batch to an AC venue and adjust attendance.
BLS re-certification cancelled after lightning alert and heavy shower. Twelve ICU nurses need new dates this week to avoid competency lapses.
Supervisor shouted and refused my pre-approved casual leave for a family clinic visit; requesting HR mediation per grievance procedure.
Duty roster gives me six consecutive night shifts, contrary to policy. Please review allocation and counsel the Sister-in-Charge.
Three new lab technologists lack EPF/ETF registration details in HRIS; March salary processing will fail. Need numbers and appointment letters urgently.
Nurse starting maternity leave earlier due to complications; please confirm entitlement and revised start date as per latest MOH circular.
Repeated verbal bullying by Theatre Manager during afternoon list; request formal inquiry and a neutral mediator.
Performance appraisal forms from OPD doctors pending; increments will be delayed. Please extend deadline and brief HODs.
Thunder and heavy rain disrupted the Safe Patient Handling training; half the staff couldn’t travel. Request an additional session or online alternative.
Background check documents for incoming ICU MO delayed by courier after downpour. Start date is 18th; need provisional clearance protocol.
Ongoing heat in staff room; request temporary relaxation of uniform policy and extra hydration break guidance until AC repair is complete.
Night guard involved in altercation with a visitor; request HR to initiate disciplinary process and arrange statements.
SLNC renewals for two ward nurses still pending; licenses expire on 21st. Afternoon storm slowed courier. Need urgent HR verification to keep them on roster.
Flash rain blocked Galle Road; six OPD staff reached late. Please convert attendance to on-duty under adverse weather policy and adjust roster.
Today’s CPD talk cancelled as lecturer was stranded by the rain. Kindly issue new date and ensure CPD points are carried over.
Supervisor denies weekly day off for the third week; request HR intervention to ensure roster complies with labour law.
Night-shift allowance not posted for 1–15 March for five nurses. Please audit attendance and process arrears before month-end.
Five new attendants due to join Monday; pre-employment medicals not scheduled. Need HR to fast-track and confirm joining letters.
Paternity leave request submitted two weeks ago; no written approval yet. Baby due next week—please confirm dates and relief cover.
Inappropriate comments from a consultant during ward round; seeking confidential HR-facilitated mediation and guidance on formal complaint.
Two porter candidates missed today’s trade test due to heavy rain; request rescheduling without penalty and update of shortlist validity.
SLMC registration number mismatch in HRIS for a consultant; malpractice cover renewal being rejected. Please correct records and confirm to MD today.
Morning humidity made the fingerprint reader reject multiple staff; five nurses missed punches. Request manual correction and guidance on backup register use.
New MO shortlisted for NICU; SLMC temporary registration not verified, delaying onboarding. Please complete credential check today to cover weekend rota.
Thunderstorm knocked out network; biometric terminals failed at shift change. Need HR to validate 11 staff clock-out and protect OT payments.
Afternoon downpour delayed recruits; OT technician orientation was canceled. HR to reschedule, issue IDs, and clarify pay from start date.
Late storm halted BLS re-cert today; eight ICU nurses expire this week. Request urgent grace period and rebooked sessions.
Several Avurudu casual leave approvals were verbal only and not in HRMIS. Please regularize before duty roster locks.
Brief downpour delayed staff buses; three night-shift nurses stuck at Slave Island stop. Kindly waive late penalties and arrange backup van per policy.
March night-shift allowance missing for four clerks despite approved OT sheets. Please correct before payroll cut-off.
Visiting fellow starts tomorrow; appointment letter lacks EPF/ETF clauses and probation terms. Need corrected contract before clinical duties.
Two new nurses started without health clearance and hepatitis-B titer files. Please complete credentialing file check.
Festival advance for eight pharmacy staff not disbursed though approved last week. Request immediate release.
Roster has me on continuous duty 13th–14th Avurudu without weekly rest. Seek HR review for labor law compliance.
Uniform supplier closed for New Year; three probationers have no scrubs. Please permit temporary issue from HR stores.
Two healthcare assistants absent claiming festival leave with no HRMIS request. Need guidance on marking as unauthorized and activating standby list.
With the heat today, staff asking for extra rest/tea breaks under well-being circular. Kindly issue clarification to all units.
After the evening thundershower, Route 255 staff bus was diverted; three nurses arrived 40 minutes late. Please mark weather-excused to avoid deductions.
LMS did not sync attendance for today’s Respectful Workplace session; 40 staff need CPD credits logged.
Two MOs’ ACLS cards expired yesterday; theatre list impacted. Request urgent renewal booking and temporary privileging note.
Acting allowance for ICU in-charge not reflecting; grade change letter missing in service record. Please update before salary run.
High humidity fogged the biometric at OPD entrance; repeated failures at sign-in. Request activation of manual attendance sheet for today.
Evening in-service on pressure injury prevention canceled due to lightning alert. Please reschedule and ensure no-show penalties are waived.
Agency cleaners worked 4 extra hours this week without signed extension letters. Need HR-compliant documentation immediately.
Formal complaint: registrar used derogatory language toward midwives during handover. Request HR inquiry and mediation.
Annual increment letter still pending though my appraisal closed in Feb. Kindly issue so salary step updates in May.
SLMC renewal receipt uploaded last week, but HRMIS still shows 'pending'; contrast lists blocked. Please clear credential status urgently.
Orientation for four new HCA recruits could not proceed as afternoon buses stopped due to flooding; please reschedule and mark today as on-duty travel disruption.
Two new interns not visible on SLMC verification list; ward cannot include them on call until HR confirms credentials.
Police clearances for three healthcare assistants delayed as station was closed after flooding; request conditional appointment letters to cover weekend shifts.
Biometric showed 'absent' for six OPD staff who arrived late due to torrential rain; please correct attendance and avoid no‑pay deductions.
Team stayed past 21:00 due to thunderstorm and no transport; request apply weather standby allowance and process OT claims.
Induction session for two radiographers was canceled after power flickers in heavy rain; need revised onboarding date and extend temporary IDs.
Locum anaesthetist scheduled for OT has no SLMC verification file in HR; list cannot start without confirmation.
Verbal harassment complaint between MO and registration clerk over duty swap; request HR mediation and written guidance on swap approvals.
Given ongoing rain, request a 15‑minute grace window on attendance for this week and rollback of late marks already flagged.
Appointment letter issued to new MO states 'Senior House Officer' grade; needs immediate corrigendum to correct pay scale and designation.
Scrub nurse’s SLNC license lapsed on 10/05; cannot post to OT until HR confirms renewal receipt.
BLS refresher for ICU batch postponed due to morning downpour; CPD deadline end‑May—please schedule an extra session next week.
Staff hostel waterlogging kept five attendants from night duty; request mark on‑duty for disaster and arrange temporary quarters through HR.
OPD cashier appraisal forms pending; increments will be held if not submitted—please extend deadline two days due to weather disruptions.
New ward orderly’s EPF/ETF numbers mismatch with NIC; payroll cannot create employee master until HR verifies.
Provisional SLMC registration for new intern not uploaded yet; restrict prescribing rights until HR completes credentialing.
Prolonged rain stranded evening OT staff; clarify eligibility for night duty allowance versus travel compensation and process claims.
Two probationary nurses absent during squall line; request HR guidance on marking disaster leave vs. no‑pay for this roster.
Attendance sheet for fire‑safety drill shows overwriting; please initiate preliminary inquiry for possible falsification and reschedule session.
Pharmacy staff reports discriminatory remark by supervisor; request formal inquiry and interim roster separation.
Midwives couldn’t reach outreach clinic due to flooded roads; please treat as on‑duty and adjust leave ledgers accordingly.
Locum paediatrician’s police clearance expired; renewal delayed after heavy rain; can HR issue temporary extension letter for weekend cover?
ACLS/BLS recertification session canceled by thunder this morning; several ETU cards expire 31/05—request urgent makeup class.
Conflict over Vesak Poya replacement day allocations between Surgery and Medicine teams; request HR‑led mediation before June roster.
Due to prolonged rain, 27 staff clocked in late; payroll auto‑deducted; please approve disaster grace period and reverse this cycle’s deductions.
Heavy morning downpour delayed several nurses; please apply attendance grace and remove ‘late’ marks for the 7:00 AM shift as per monsoon contingency.
Locum MO scheduled for 8:00 AM OPD; SLMC renewal copy not on file. Kindly verify credentials before allowing duty.
Thunderstorm flooded the seminar room; interns’ mandatory BLS refresher was cancelled. Request reschedule and LMS attendance update.
Police clearance for new Pharmacy Assistant pending three weeks; onboarding stuck. Please expedite background check.
HCA maternity leave starts next week; portal still shows ‘pending’. Need approval confirmation and reliever posting.
Short heavy rain and lightning disrupted commutes; three staff missed today’s CPD e-modules. Please extend deadline.
Formal grievance: senior registrar used demeaning language during morning handover. Request HR inquiry per harassment policy.
Intermittent heavy spells led to extra travel costs. Kindly clarify rain-day transport reimbursement under the CBA.
Two physiotherapists’ SLaHPC licenses expire this month. Please verify renewals to avoid last-minute roster gaps.
During the morning downpour, the biometric reader at Ward 6 failed; several staff marked ‘absent’. Request manual correction and register activation.
Unable to attend today’s NICU nurse interviews due to emergency rounds. Please reschedule and reissue candidate notices.
Two anesthesia MOs have overlapping annual leave. Request HR mediation to stagger leave per policy to maintain theatre cover.
Post-thunder downpour, two night-duty nurses were stranded. Please activate monsoon accommodation/transport allowance tonight.
Attendant slipped on a damp corridor while reporting to duty in the rain. Need guidance on injury-on-duty claim and MC submission.
Locum technologist’s contract ends on 30th; renewal letter not issued. STAT workload rising—please expedite extension.
Staff ID 427 clocked repeated late marks due to school drop-offs. Request counseling session before formal discipline.
With rain-related absences, two staff worked 12+ hours without proper breaks. Please enforce rest periods and process OT per labor regulations.
Allowance withheld; HRIS shows incomplete PGIM logbook. I emailed scans last week—please verify and release payment.
Pre-dawn heavy rain halted the staff bus on the coastal route. Request emergency taxis and rain-day allowance to maintain ETU coverage.
Night shift allowance for May is incorrect after roster swap. Please audit and rectify before payroll cutoff.
Onboarding packs (ID, email) for three new dialysis nurses still pending; orientation starts tomorrow 8:00 AM.
Transfer order issued without relocation briefing; staff member is refusing. Please mediate and arrange policy counseling.
Heavy coastal downpour affected attendance at the mandatory fire-safety drill. Request weekend makeup session and HRIS attendance update.
New admin executive shows EPF/ETF number mismatch with NIC. Please verify employee details before monthly submission.
Exit clearance still pending (HR forms, on-call phone handover). Please fast-track to release final salary by month-end.
Newly joined OPD cashier’s onboarding is incomplete—EPF/ETF numbers not generated in HRIS. Payroll cut-off is Friday; request HR to finalize records to avoid unpaid wages.
Trainee nurse reports repeated hostile remarks from a senior during ward teaching. Request formal HR mediation and guidance on the dignity-at-work policy.
Heavy rain and flooded bus routes delayed multiple morning-shift nurses. Please authorize grace period and adjust attendance to prevent unfair ‘late’ penalties.
Humidity after the downpour caused fingerprint scanner misreads; five staff were auto-marked absent. Request HR to accept manual logs and correct duty hours.
Locum MO rostered tonight; SLMC provisional registration copy not found in the credential file. Need urgent verification/clearance before allowing independent duty.
BLS recertification cohort from Ward 12 could not arrive due to steady rain and road closures. Please reschedule and extend expiring cards to keep them compliant.
Night-shift nurses used tuk transport because of rain; current allowance policy is unclear for emergency shifts. Request HR guidance and approval for reimbursements.
Staff nurse requesting maternity leave transferred from Provincial Hospital last month. Need HR to merge service record and confirm correct leave entitlement dates.
Post-thunderstorm parking dispute—guard alleges verbal abuse by lab porter. Formal grievance lodged; please initiate HR inquiry and mediation with witness notes.
CPD credits for three MOs from last CME are missing in the HRIS. Request update before mid-year appraisal to avoid adverse performance remarks.
Concern of potential nepotism in pharmacy assistant recruitment—two shortlisted candidates are related to a panel member. Request independent observer and audit of scoring.
Two midwives submitted backdated sick notes covering the rainy roster gap. Please review certificates and attendance policy; request HR investigation.
HR Training room double-booked; airway workshop lost its morning slot. Kindly arrange an extra session and issue duty-cover letters for those who missed.
Overtime and hazard allowance for dialysis technicians not reflected for last two weeks. Request HR to reconcile timesheets and release payments before month-end.
Probation confirmation for junior physiotherapist pending despite satisfactory appraisal. Increment is due this cycle; please finalize the confirmation letter.
After rain-related delays, two ambulance drivers exceeded weekly duty-hour limits. Need HR guidance on labour law compliance and compensatory off allocation.
HO reports bullying by a registrar during night rounds. Request formal HR-led inquiry and temporary rota adjustment to ensure a safe learning environment.
Multiple radiographers applied for leave during Esala Perahera week; service coverage at risk. Please enforce leave caps by cadre and assist with staggered approvals.
Steady rain left several nurses stranded after night duty. Request HR to allocate temporary hostel rooms and approve short-notice stay per policy.
Biometric terminal failed during morning rain; in/out times missing for attendants. Kindly accept the manual log and issue a memo on fallback attendance.
Background check for shortlisted Biomedical Engineer flagged undisclosed prior disciplinary action. Please review with referees and advise if offer should be held.
Audit shows inconsistent on-call meal allowance claims in OT teams. Request HR to issue a unified rate circular and retroactively correct last two months.
Nurse slipped at the main entrance during morning drizzle; on medical leave for a week. Please process injury-on-duty paperwork and Agrahara claim forms.
Gusty rain delayed afternoon BLS recert; crew finished after rostered hours. Request HR approval to mark training overtime and adjust next-shift duty.
Repeated difficulty obtaining Tamil interpretation for OPD Paediatrics. Please expedite recruitment of bilingual health care assistants as per approved cadre.
Morning humidity caused repeated failures on the OPD biometric device; several early-shift nurses could not clock in. Please regularize attendance and advise an alternate sign-in for today.
Junior MO joined Ward 7 today but police clearance and SLMC provisional registration are missing in his file. Request urgent credential verification before independent duty.
Afternoon thundershower disrupted the in-service session; 12 staff were delayed and marked absent. Please reschedule and record as official training, not casual leave.
Overtime allocation dispute between two theatre attendants for July; both allege unfair distribution by the ward clerk. Request HR mediation and policy review.
Onboarding of a new radiographer is stalled; NIC copy and agency background check are pending. Imaging rota is short—please expedite pre-employment verification.
Heavy morning rain delayed staff from Ja-Ela/Kandana; eight counters are unmanned due to late arrivals. Kindly apply wet-weather grace and adjust roster.
Intern induction shifted to Zoom due to afternoon thunder and damp near the auditorium. Please mark attendance as compliant and circulate the revised checklist.
Risk allowance for dengue-duty nurses (July) not reflected for five staff. Kindly rectify payroll and process arrears in the next cycle.
Locum anaesthetist’s SLMC renewal expires on 15 Aug; cannot roster him for weekend lists without proof. Need immediate credential confirmation.
Maternity leave application (20 weeks) for an OPD Nursing Officer submitted. Request approval and backfill via bank nurses from 26 Aug.
Evening rain delayed arrivals for BLS re-certification; several marked absent. Please allow a make-up session and adjust attendance.
Formal grievance: Surgical Ward supervisor allegedly used abusive language regarding duty swaps. Request HR inquiry and counseling intervention.
Gusty rain affected staff transport; handovers were delayed. Please activate monsoon contingency for taxi reimbursements and shift-swap protocol.
Annex biometric scanner had moisture ingress; 19 missed punches recorded. Kindly authorize manual regularization and an interim paper sign-in.
Two pharmacists swapped shifts informally to attend classes, causing an OPD coverage gap. Request HR guidance on corrective action and study-leave process.
Quarterly appraisals for four ICU HOs pending; forms not submitted. Please extend deadline by one week and share the updated template.
Overnight guards covered 16-hour stretches due to rain-related absences, likely breaching labor limits. Request HR review, OT cap enforcement, and relief deployment.
Orientation for new minor staff needs a venue change due to damp auditorium. Kindly confirm new date/time and ensure mandatory modules are covered.
Request EAP counseling for a maternity ward nurse distressed after roster changes; prefers Sinhala-speaking counselor. Please schedule soon.
Background checks for three outsourced cleaners incomplete; one NIC mismatch noted. Please hold ID issuance and access until cleared.
EPF number for new junior physio rejected in payroll; digits transposed on appointment letter. Please correct and ensure ETF enrollment.
Perceived inequity in study-leave approvals for PGIM exams between units. Request transparent criteria and retroactive regularization of two days.
Heavy rain disrupted the staff van; 11 registration clerks arrived >30 mins late. Please apply grace, reassign counters, and avoid no-pay deductions.
Mandatory fire-safety module exam on LMS failed during the thunderstorm. Request deadline extension and an extra sitting next week.
Credential files for two consultants lack current SLMC specialist verification letters; Ministry quality inspection next week. Kindly obtain and file urgently.
Biometric marked the morning OPD cashier as Absent after a 25‑minute late arrival due to the brief rain and bus delays. Request HR to correct attendance and process 30 minutes OT for the cover staff.
Three shortlisted nursing candidates reported they cannot reach on time due to the muggy morning and light showers. Kindly reschedule today’s walk‑in interviews and notify the panel.
A new locum MO reported for ETU duty with an unverified SLMC number. Please conduct immediate credential verification before assigning further shifts.
Two newly recruited attendants were rostered without police clearance letters and medical fitness files. Request HR to halt deployment and complete onboarding documentation.
Duty roster changes appear preferential, causing repeated night duties for juniors. Need HR mediation and guidance on fair roster policy.
Short squalls and gusts delayed over a dozen minor staff from clocking in. Please activate disaster leniency clause and avoid late‑mark penalties for today.
Radiographer campus outreach was called off due to afternoon rain and transport disruption. Request approval to shift to a virtual info session and re‑issue invites.
Six ICU nurses have BLS/ACLS expiring this week; evening thunderstorms may disrupt the external session. Please organize an on‑site refresher or alternative slot.
Reporting repeated verbal intimidation by a senior during ward rounds. Request confidential HR mediation and guidance on grievance procedure.
Intermittent rain caused night shift handover to close early; biometric logs show mismatched times. Please audit and reconcile with the manual register.
Two overseas anaesthetists are awaiting temporary SLMC registration and work visa endorsements. Request HR to expedite credentialing to stabilize OT lists.
Heavy rain overnight delayed several relievers; incomplete handover in Medical A. Kindly apply attendance leniency and approve emergency transport allowance.
Today’s anti‑harassment training was canceled due to thunder and poor turnout. Please set a new mandatory date and roll over the attendance list.
Guards at the OPD gate report heat stress during the hot, windy afternoon. Request HR to formalize hydration breaks and issue caps as PPE.
Probation for three junior MLTs ends on 30 Sept; appraisal panel not yet scheduled. Need HR to convene the board and finalize confirmations.
One attendant’s promotion letter didn’t update EPF/ETF numbers; payslip shows old grade. Please correct benefits and issue an amended slip.
Two interns requested immediate no‑pay leave as their hometowns are flooded after thundery rain. Kindly process leave and activate the reliever pool.
Interview panel members are rain‑bound; candidates are waiting. Please approve switching to Zoom using the hospital boardroom and notify all.
Shift swap dispute between two technicians escalated during morning briefing. Request HR mediation and a clear written swap protocol.
SLMC registry shows one resident’s APC expired. Need urgent verification and HR guidance on immediate duty restriction until resolved.
Induction for new minor staff clashed with the evening thunderstorm; power dips affected the hall. Please move to the backup venue and adjust attendance marking.
Continuous rain caused damp loads and a linen backlog. Request HR approval for extended shifts and call‑out allowance for tonight.
A nursing officer’s maternity leave is not reflected in the roster; ward has assigned nights next week. Kindly rectify and arrange compliant cover.
Patient’s relative alleged a ward clerk demanded money for a referral. Request HR to initiate a formal disciplinary inquiry per policy.
Mandatory fire drill attendance shows several consultants absent without exemption. Please enforce makeup session with CME credit and notify HR files.

Lightning during the evening storm caused a power dip and the biometric reader at Gate 2 reset; attendance logs between 07:15–08:30 PM are missing. Request HR validation of manual sign-in sheets so staff aren’t penalised.
Orientation for seven new nursing officers was halted due to thunder alerts and water pooling near the lecture hall. HR to reschedule and ensure mandatory induction is captured this week.
Sudden downpour flooded the bus stand; six staff arrived 30–60 minutes late. Please confirm HR grace-period policy and adjust no‑pay/overtime entries for today’s roster.
Locum radiographer reported without police clearance; only NIC copy provided. Request urgent credential verification before assigning to CT suite.
Last night’s lightning knocked the LMS offline; BLS refresher attendance for 24 nurses wasn’t recorded. HR support needed to reconcile completion to avoid non‑compliance.
New temporary technician reports EPF/ETF numbers not set up though he started last week. Please confirm onboarding paperwork and ensure contributions before payroll cut‑off.
Two junior nurses allege intimidation by a senior over off‑duty swaps. Request HR mediation and guidance on proper roster change procedure.
Anaesthesia locum for tomorrow’s list has an SLMC card showing last month’s expiry; only an email of renewal submitted. HR/Medical Staff Office to verify before granting theatre access.
Strong storm delayed staff transport; ETU night shift short by three. Need HR to authorise emergency stayback payments and activate locum call list.
Due to last night’s thunder, several staff used manual sign‑in and the attendance incentive was auto‑deducted. Request HR to regularise and prevent no‑pay errors.
Persistent rain led to eight absences and two early departures. Please activate the HR locum pool and approve double‑back as per policy.
Clerical staff worked past 8:00 PM due to transport disruptions. Need HR guidance on overtime ceilings and meal allowance per labour law.
Today’s MO‑OPD recruitment interviews proceeded without the external observer listed in the panel TOR. HR to advise on validity and whether we must reconvene.
E‑Leave portal remains down after last night’s violent storm; 37 paper leave forms pending. HR needed to input approvals before payroll freeze.
House officer requests study leave for PGIM exam next week. Need HR confirmation of eligibility and cover plan for medical ward rounds.
Reported verbal harassment by a porter over document handling during evening shift. Request initiation of formal grievance and safe‑duty placement.
Humidity and brief rain caused repeated fingerprint misreads at Staff Entrance B; 12 nurses missed punches. Please authorise manual attendance for this shift.
Dispute between two theatre nurses over night‑list allocation escalating on the floor. HR mediation requested before duty commences.
Pre‑employment background check for ambulance driver shows a pending traffic case. HR to assess fitness for duty and withhold ID/roster until cleared.
Induction for minor staff cancelled due to water seepage in Training Room 2 during squalls. Request HR to reschedule and track completion of safety modules this week.
On‑call allowance distribution appears unequal between ETU teams for September. Please audit with HR and correct before payslips are released.
Overnight squally rain left key approach roads flooded; several members were marked absent no‑pay. Request HR circular on disaster‑related attendance and reversal of deductions.
New pharmacy intern has only provisional registration expiring next week. HR/credentialing to verify extension with the council and adjust roster if not renewed.
Projector damaged by lightning; mandatory fire safety briefing for October cancelled. Need HR to arrange alternative sessions to maintain training compliance for JCI prep.
Dispute on applying revised maternity leave to a nurse starting on 05 Nov; two conflicting circulars are in circulation. HR decision and roster adjustments required.
This afternoon’s radiographer interview panel could not convene after the thunderstorm; two external panelists were stranded. Request HR to reschedule and issue revised call letters.
OPD biometric reader fogged during rain; six nurses couldn’t clock in. Please accept manual register for AM shift and correct attendance.
Night-shift nurses request hospital van due to flooded routes and steady rain; two reported unsafe walk from Kiribathgoda stop. HR to arrange temporary shuttle tonight.
Locum paediatrician’s SLMC renewal not yet verified; courier delayed by storms. He has started rounds. Need HR to suspend duty until verification clears.
Dispute over duty allocation in Main OT; porter refusing sterile trolley runs citing roster. Request HR mediation before morning list begins.
Two housekeeping attendants approved casual leave on same days during dengue clean-up drive; ward short-staffed. HR to review approvals and provide backfill.
BLS refresher at D-Block cancelled as hall roof leaked in yesterday’s storm. HR Training to reschedule and preserve CPD credits.
ETU staff crossed monthly OT cap after squally-rain surge. Need HR to regularize OT and post allowances before cut-off.
Newly confirmed lab technologist’s ETF not reflected in October payroll. Please audit and back-post contributions.
Multiple nurses report repeated verbal abuse by Medical Unit consultant during rounds. Request formal grievance process and mediated meeting per policy.
ICU nurses’ CME from 05 Nov not logged in NTS; promotion requirements affected. HR Training to update records with attendance sheets.
On-call ambulance drivers worked 16+ hours covering flood transfers. Please enforce rest intervals and adjust rota per labour law.
Midwife’s maternity leave was processed as sick leave; November payslip shows LOP risk. Kindly rectify leave code and arrears.
Background check for new pharmacy tech shows NIC/name mismatch; originals arrived rain-soaked and stamp unreadable. HR to reverify before scheduling shifts.
Mandatory fire-safety drill postponed due to steady rain and thunder. HR to publish a new date and ensure full attendance.
Two interns completed 36-hour continuous duty covering rain-related absences. Request HR to review rota and cap duty hours.
October night shift allowance for ETU MOs not paid. Please correct payroll and notify staff.
Supervisor demanded ‘tea money’ to approve my casual leave. Request confidential HR inquiry under misconduct policy.

reports.reporter_role: School of Nursing Tutor (Attached to Hospital)
reports.incident_description: New nursing students began postings without ID badges; access to OT and ICU blocked. HR to expedite badges and system access.
I report repeated unwelcome remarks by a senior storekeeper near Records. Request formal sexual harassment process and safeguards.
Retiring Theatre Sister’s leave encashment excludes 12 carried-over days. Please audit per policy before gratuity release.
CPD attendance sheets became illegible in heavy rain while moving between blocks. HR to reconstruct from ward logs.
Locum anaesthetist’s contract expired on 25 Nov; still covering lists. Need immediate renewal or stand-down for compliance.
Due to drizzle-day crowding at HR, several HOs were enrolled with wrong department code. Roster mapping and OT lines are incorrect; please fix.
Main Gate night guard found asleep at 03:20 hrs; second occurrence this month. Request HR to schedule disciplinary inquiry.
Heavy morning rain flooded the staff gate; eight nurses clocked late. Request a 30‑minute grace period and attendance adjustment for the AM shift.
Physiotherapist interviews were disrupted by afternoon thunder showers; two shortlisted candidates were stranded. Please reschedule and notify panel per recruitment policy.
Roster swap dispute escalated into shouting at the counter. Request HR mediation and a written guideline on swap approvals.
Locum MO on duty had no current SLMC renewal in the file. Please verify credentials and suspend further locum shifts until cleared.
November OT for ambulance drivers during the dengue transfers is missing from payroll. Kindly audit and process arrears before mid‑month.
Orientation hall was over capacity; 12 new nurses missed HR onboarding modules. Request a makeup session and update of training records.
Vendor guards at Gate 3 reported without police clearance letters. HR to enforce credential checks and restrict duty until documents are verified.
Two nurses reported inappropriate remarks by a Senior MO during night round. Request immediate HR‑led inquiry under the harassment policy.
Light rain delayed a shortlisted radiographer by 12 minutes; panel declined to proceed. Please review fairness and set a weather grace rule.
Probation review for a pharmacy technician lapsed due to HOD leave. Request formal extension to avoid automatic confirmation.
Morning thunder showers delayed the staff shuttle; many clock‑ins were late. Please mark attendance as weather‑excused for today.
BLS certificates for three MOs expired last week. Kindly schedule immediate recertification and update compliance records.
Evening rain slowed staff arrivals; casuals are disputing weekend rates citing a new circular. Need HR clarification and revised letters.
Staff Nurse due for confinement next week; maternity leave approval still pending. Please expedite sanction and arrange temporary replacement.
New Lab Technologist EPF number mismatches ETF record; bank rejected salary credit. HR to correct master data and issue amendment.
Rain caused sudden school closures; multiple nurses requested short‑notice Childcare Leave. Need HR guidance on compassionate/no‑pay allocation today.
Study leave approvals for upcoming PGIM exams appear uneven across units. Request transparent criteria and an appeal process.
Consultant applicant claims an overseas fellowship; referees not confirming. HR to verify credentials before issuing the appointment letter.
Nursing quarters overcrowded; some interns occupying without allocation. Request HR‑assisted reallocation and updated hostel roster.
OT claims from the dengue surge week remain pending; today’s light showers delayed courier submissions. Please process before month‑end.
January intern MO batch arrives soon; ID cards and appointment letters are not ready. Request expedited onboarding kits before 01 Jan.
Perceived favoritism in roster allocations; repeated denial of off‑days. Request HR grievance hearing and neutral roster audit.
Afternoon humidity reduced attendance for CME. Please reschedule to a morning slot and capture attendance for CPD compliance.
Promoted Senior Staff Nurse placed on the wrong salary step in December payroll. HR to correct scale and pay arrears.
Several HODs have not filed 2024 performance appraisals. Request deadline extension and a short refresher on the new form.
